markdownRemark.html:
This release updates Kubernetes to v1.26.12, and fixes a number of issues.

For more details on what's new, see the Kubernetes release notes.

Changes since v1.26.11+k3s2:

  • Runtimes backport (#9014)
    • Added runtime classes for wasm/nvidia/crun
    • Added default runtime flag for containerd
  • Bump containerd/runc to v1.7.10-k3s1/v1.1.10 (#8964)
  • Fix overlapping address range (#9019)
  • Allow setting default-runtime on servers (#9028)
  • Bump containerd to v1.7.11 (#9042)
  • Update to v1.26.12-k3s1 (#9077)

Embedded Component Versions

Component Version
Kubernetes v1.26.12
Kine v0.11.0
SQLite 3.42.0
Etcd v3.5.9-k3s1
Containerd v1.7.11-k3s2.26
Runc v1.1.10
Flannel v0.22.2
Metrics-server v0.6.3
Traefik v2.10.5
CoreDNS v1.10.1
Helm-controller v0.15.4
Local-path-provisioner v0.0.24

Helpful Links

As always, we welcome and appreciate feedback from our community of users. Please feel free to:

  • Open issues here
  • Join our Slack channel
  • Check out our documentation for guidance on how to get started or to dive deep into K3s.
  • Read how you can contribute here

What's Changed

  • [Release-1.26] Runtimes backport by @vitorsavian in https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/9014
  • [release-1.26] Bump containerd/runc to v1.7.10-k3s1/v1.1.10 by @brandond in https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/8964
  • [Release 1.26] Fix overlapping address range by @manuelbuil in https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/9019
  • [release-1.26] Allow setting default-runtime on servers by @brandond in https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/9028
  • [release-1.26] Bump containerd to v1.7.11 by @brandond in https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/9042
  • Update to v1.26.12-k3s1 by @Tashima42 in https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/9077

Full Changelog: https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/compare/v1.26.11+k3s2...v1.26.12+k3s1
